ddls:
CREATE TABLE "energy_points" (
  "point_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each energy monitoring point */,
  "point_name" TEXT /* Name of the energy point (e.g., SitePower1) */,
  "volttron_point_name" TEXT /* Name of the corresponding Volttron point */,
  "units" TEXT /* Measurement units (e.g., kW) */,
  "units_details" TEXT /* Details regarding the range of measurement units (e.g., 0.00 to 100.00) */,
  "modbus_register" TEXT /* Modbus register identifier for communication */,
  "writable" INTEGER /* Indicates if the point is writable (i.e., can be modified) */,
  "point_address" INTEGER /* Address of the energy point for data retrieval */,
  "notes" TEXT /* Additional notes related to the energy point */,
  "energy_point_type" TEXT /* Type of energy point (e.g., meter, sub-meter, load) */,
  "parent_point_id" INTEGER /* Foreign key referencing the parent energy point (if applicable) */,
  "installed_date" TEXT /* Date of installation */,
  "last_maintenance_date" TEXT /* Date of last maintenance */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("point_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "energy_consumption" (
  "energy_consumption_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each energy consumption record */,
  "point_id" INTEGER /* Foreign key referencing the energy point */,
  "reading_time" TEXT /* Time stamp of the energy consumption reading */,
  "energy_consumption" TEXT /* Energy consumption value */,
  "units" TEXT /* Measurement units (e.g., kW) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("energy_consumption_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "energy_targets" (
  "energy_target_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each energy target */,
  "point_id" INTEGER /* Foreign key referencing the energy point */,
  "target_name" TEXT /* Name of the energy target */,
  "target_value" TEXT /* Target energy consumption value */,
  "units" TEXT /* Measurement units (e.g., kW) */,
  "start_date" TEXT /* Start date of the energy target */,
  "end_date" TEXT /* End date of the energy target */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("energy_target_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "alerts" (
  "alert_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each alert */,
  "energy_point_id" INTEGER /* Foreign key referencing the energy point */,
  "alert_type" TEXT /* Type of alert (e.g., energy target exceeded, system error) */,
  "alert_message" TEXT /* Alert message */,
  "alert_timestamp" TEXT /* Time stamp of the alert */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("alert_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "username" TEXT /* Username chosen by the user */,
  "password" TEXT /* Password for the user */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user (e.g., admin, viewer) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "user_access" (
  "user_access_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user access record */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Foreign key referencing the user */,
  "energy_point_id" INTEGER /* Foreign key referencing the energy point */,
  "read_access" INTEGER /* Indicates if the user has read access to the energy point */,
  "write_access" INTEGER /* Indicates if the user has write access to the energy point */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_access_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "third_party_systems" (
  "third_party_system_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each third-party system */,
  "system_name" TEXT /* Name of the third-party system */,
  "system_type" TEXT /* Type of the third-party system (e.g., energy management, building automation) */,
  "api_key" TEXT /* API key for integration */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("third_party_system_id")
)
